title: NATO Pulls Last Military Trainers From Iraq Amid Strikes From Iran
summary_full: The NATO mission, created in 2018, trained and advised Iraqi forces. Iraq is among the countries facing retaliatory attacks from the U.S.-Israeli war.
summary_public: The NATO mission, created in 2018, trained and advised Iraqi forces. Iraq is among the countries facing retaliatory attacks from the U.S.-Israeli war.

IL.label: negative
IL.evidence: retaliatory attacks from the U.S.-Israeli war
